title: Harden terminal baseline diagnostics
goal: Make registry-truth treat missing baseline commits on verified tasks as hard freshness errors, and repair existing dead baseline metadata without claiming task incompletion.

metadata.source_review: Follow-up from Bureau improvement review: baseline warnings should be stronger for verified tasks.
metadata.safety_boundary: Hardens freshness diagnostics only; does not infer task incompletion from a dead baseline.

acceptance.assertion: registry-truth reports missing baseline_commit on verified tasks as an error and unhealthy result.
planned tasks with missing baseline_commit remain warnings, because a dead planning baseline does not prove task completion state.
Existing dead Lenskit baseline commits are removed from execution metadata and recorded as removed_dead_baseline_commit evidence without changing task outcome claims.
